sourceMovie.title: Paddington in Peru
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Paddington in Peru (2024) as a family theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The family and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Ice Age: Dawn of the Dinosaurs
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Paddington in Peru clicked for you, Ice Age: Dawn of the Dinosaurs (2009) is a strong next stop: both trade in family and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Paddington in Peru?
faq.answer: Try Ice Age: Dawn of the Dinosaurs, The Croods: A New Age, The Secret Life of Pets 2—each shares DNA with Paddington in Peru while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Paddington in Peru?
faq.answer: Paddington in Peru (2024) is best described as Family, Comedy, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Paddington in Peru part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Paddington Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
